---
title: "Hello World"
description: "Welcome to my new site — what to expect and what's coming next."
date: "2026-03-02"
categories: [general, meta]
---

## Welcome

This is the first post on my new site. I plan to write about software development,
WebAssembly experiments, AI, and whatever else catches my attention.

## What to Expect

- Notes on projects I'm working on
- WebAssembly demos and write-ups
- AI and data analysis deep dives
- General thoughts on technology

## About This Site

The site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) — a scientific and technical
publishing system. It supports blogs, books, interactive code, and much more.

Thanks for stopping by. More to come.
